# TiledStyleDefinition.SourceImageHandle property

The `hSourceImage` field (NSlice +0x18) — the texture handle the engine slices/tiles. Resolves via the icon-frame index. `0u` when absent.

```csharp
public uint SourceImageHandle { get; set; }
```
